relationship_to_restored_text: Interpretive contemplative layer aligned by verse. This does not replace the source-audited restored translation.

verses.mystical_translation: Job answered the Eternal after the whirlwind.
He knows now that no divine purpose can be cut off.
He recognizes that he spoke of wonders beyond his understanding.
The posture reverses: now he listens and receives.
Job retracts and is comforted upon dust and ashes.
The friends are corrected: they did not speak rightly of the Divine as Job did.
Job becomes intercessor for the very friends who misread him.
The friends obey, and Job’s face is lifted.
When Job prays for his friends, his captivity turns.
Family and former companions return with bread, sympathy, comfort, silver, and gold.
The latter days become blessed beyond the beginning.
Children are born again into Job’s house.
The daughters are named and remembered.
The daughters receive beauty, visibility, and inheritance among brothers.
Job lives to see four generations.
Job dies old and full of days.
